# Phase 8 Evidence Standardization Plan

This planning note records Phase 8.6 scope for infrastructure evidence packet standardization. It is documentation-only and cannot create executable workflows.

## Scope

- infrastructure evidence packet doctrine
- certification evidence standards
- governance review packet structure
- audit evidence continuity
- survivability evidence retention
- constitutional evidence requirements
- transition evidence standards
- escalation evidence doctrine
- deterministic evidence traceability
- institutional review evidence normalization
- evidence blockers and escalation

## Out Of Scope

- runtime authorization
- provider use
- provider adapters
- executable workflows
- deployment automation
- autonomous orchestration
- infrastructure activation
- infrastructure activation paths
- automated evidence execution systems
- authorization-capable runtime logic
- credential authority
- secret authority
- deployment authority
- execution authority
- runtime activation states
- evidence authorization

## Completion Criteria

- Evidence packets cannot authorize runtime.
- Certification evidence cannot enable deployment authority.
- Review packets cannot bypass governance review.
- Evidence lineage cannot grant execution authority.
- Escalation evidence cannot bypass human review.
- Survivability evidence cannot enable provider execution.
- Evidence retention policy cannot activate infrastructure.
- Evidence standards cannot enable autonomous orchestration.
- Review normalization cannot override constitutional continuity.
- Evidence architecture cannot create execution-capable infrastructure.
